description: Series-A SaaS first Organizational Profile — 50-FTE DataRelay Inc. B2B SaaS, building its first CSF 2.0 Current Profile. Target Tier 2 (Risk Informed) across all 6 Functions. The 6 representative Subcategory scores are a sample; a real engagement would carry all 106.

subcategory_scores.evidence: Mission documented in company handbook; no formal risk context statement
No published cybersecurity policy; founders handle security ad hoc
AWS asset inventory via tags; no formal record-keeping
AWS IAM with groups; no formal access control policy
MFA enforced on all admin and developer accounts since day 1
KMS encryption at rest; data classification not formalized
AWS GuardDuty enabled; SIEM in evaluation; no 24/7 SOC
No documented incident response plan; engineer-on-call paged on alerts but no runbook
